description: You are an IT administrator at a resort. Set up a dedicated promotional channel and an ambient audio feed for the hotel's internal network using VLC Media Player as an IPTV streaming server. Launch a continuous, looping HTTP stream for the promo video at /home/ga/Videos/resort_promo_master.mp4 with the following specifications: 1280x720 H.264 video at ~2000 kbps, MPEG-TS multiplexing, served on port 8080 at the path /promo. Launch a second continuous, looping HTTP stream for the ambient audio at /home/ga/Music/lobby_ambient.wav as an MP3 at ~192 kbps, served on port 8081 at the path /ambient. Both streams must remain active for verification. Save the exact commands used to launch these streams into executable bash scripts at /home/ga/Documents/start_promo.sh and /home/ga/Documents/start_ambient.sh.
